case_title: MARTIN HOYT VS. A&M FOX LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOYT, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT A&M FOX LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SOURCE RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
